# timeOffset

**Instance Property**

The time offset, in seconds, between the camera’s clock and the computer’s clock.

## Declaration

```swift
var timeOffset: TimeInterval { get }
```

## Discussion

The value of this property is positive if the camera’s clock is ahead of the computer’s clock. Ignore this property if the camera’s [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDevice/capabilities] do not include [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceCapability/cameraDeviceCanSyncClock].

## Synchronizing the Clock

- **requestSyncClock()**: Synchronizes the camera’s clock with the computer’s clock.
